---
title: "sovereign_hud.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\sovereign_hud.py"
loc: 145
complexity: 11
logic_score: 5.00
style_score: 3.65
intel_score: 2.23
overall_score: 2.01
---

## Intent
The `sovereign_hud.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on SovereignHUD, _ensure_persona, get_theme, _get_width, box_top, box_row, box_separator, box_bottom, persona_log, log, stream_text. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignHUD, _ensure_persona, get_theme, _get_width, box_top, box_row, box_separator, box_bottom, persona_log, log, stream_text. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 70 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [contextlib](file://contextlib)
- [os](file://os)
- [re](file://re)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [ctypes](file://ctypes)
- [json](file://json)

### Exports
- `SovereignHUD`
- `_ensure_persona`
- `get_theme`
- `_get_width`
- `box_top`
- `box_row`
- `box_separator`
- `box_bottom`
- `persona_log`
- `log`
- `stream_text`
